entities.description: cpu is a component that contains bootrom and is responsible for initiating the boot process
bootrom is a type of software stored within the cpu that initiates the boot process
emmc flash is a storage device that is checked for spl boot program during the boot process
sd  is a storage device that is checked for spl boot program during the boot process
usb    is a device interface that is checked for spl boot program during the boot process
spl     is a boot program that is searched for on various devices during the boot process

relations.description: the cpu contains bootrom  which is responsible for initiating the boot process
the cpu checks emmc flash for the spl boot program as part of the boot process
the cpu checks sd  for the spl boot program as part of the boot process
the cpu checks usb    for the spl boot program as part of the boot process
bootrom is responsible for searching for and loading the spl     during the boot process
